nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: I use it mainly as a collaboration tool for me to build off of, and very rarely delegate complete tasks to AI

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI can make mistakes and hallucinate, and when that happens, it is a huge hassle to detect what went wrong

nodes.label: Code ownership and understanding
nodes.grounding_span: I'd rather be able to understand exactly what I built and how I built it to facilitate bug fixing and follow industry standards

nodes.label: Quality and robustness of work for clients
nodes.label_negative: Compromised quality due to over-reliance on AI
nodes.grounding_span: I highly value the quality and robustness of my work, so I want to make sure that I am building the best possible product

nodes.label: AI as evolving tool requiring human adaptation
nodes.label_negative: AI as static tool with current limitations
nodes.grounding_span: Perhaps my approach may begin to include some delegation as AI improves the quality of its deliverables

nodes.label: Professional competence and code ownership
nodes.grounding_span: I'd rather be able to understand exactly what I built and how I built it

nodes.label: Client success and satisfaction
nodes.grounding_span: I highly value the quality and robustness of my work

nodes.label: Career advancement and adaptability
nodes.grounding_span: how I can find a niche spot to grow my career amidst all of that

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: I then review and double check the AI answer to make sure it is correct and use it to help my decision making

nodes.label: Frustration with AI delegation due to poor output
nodes.grounding_span: it would build the context in a very illogical way which made it hard for me to integrate and led to time spent bug fixing

nodes.label: Cautious openness to future delegation
nodes.grounding_span: Perhaps my approach may begin to include some delegation as AI improves the quality of its deliverables, but still with limitations

nodes.label: Iterative verification and follow-up
nodes.grounding_span: I then review and double check the AI answer to make sure it is correct

nodes.label: Adaptive career flexibility — shifts focus rather than resisting change
